content:
# Dsa

**Summary**: A method to measure the contact angle of a liquid drop on a solid surface.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-jabbar|JABBAR, 2012]] used DSA to determine the impact of brine chemistry on the contact angles of model oils on carbonate surfaces.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- DSA was used to capture images and calculate contact angles for both calcite crystals and carbonate rocks across various brine treatments. ([[2012-jabbar|JABBAR, 2012, p. 49]])
